Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT MAP(ARRAY['FullServiceRestaurant', 'QuickServiceRestaurant', 'RetailStandalone', 'RetailStripmall', 'PrimarySchool', 'SecondarySchool', 'SmallOffice', 'MediumOffice', 'LargeOffice', 'SmallHotel', 'LargeHotel', 'Hospital', 'Outpatient', 'Warehouse'], ARRAY['Food', 'Food', 'Retail', 'Retail', 'School', 'School', 'Office', 'Office', 'Office', 'Lodging', 'Lodging', 'Health', 'Health', 'Warehouse'])[bs."in.comstock_building_type"] AS simple_bldg_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/0824b5ecf542d6670560e4bba361789d579479cd88bd46b7a1b4a042d0304603/8ea743de-7bd9-47ef-9c4d-61e137f0fa46/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
